exchange, urban loneliness"},"prompt":"Create a 7-panel black-and-white manga page in a gritty neo-noir style, set in a rain-soaked Japanese alley at night. In the top wide panel, show a young man in a trench coat from behind approaching a lone woman standing under a streetlight in the distance.
